disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellowing of the skin and eyes with dark, tea-coloured urine developing over the past week
trigger_question_examples: What have you noticed changing in the last week?
Have you noticed any change in your skin, eyes or urine colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The whites of my eyes and my skin have gone yellow this week, and my urine has turned dark like tea.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Three weeks of profound fatigue, loss of appetite and mild nausea, unable to work
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been feeling this way?
How is your appetite and energy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about three weeks I've had no energy and no appetite, a bit of nausea, and I've been too exhausted to work.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A preceding run of low-grade fevers, migratory joint aches and a faint maculopapular trunk rash before the jaundice
trigger_question_examples: Did anything come before the yellowing — fevers, aches or a rash?
Have you had any joint pains or skin changes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Before my skin went yellow I had low-grade fevers, achy joints that moved from one to another, and a faint blotchy rash came up on my chest and back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A needle-stick injury at work in healthcare about 3 months ago that was never formally reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any exposure to blood or body fluids, needles, tattoos, or new sexual contacts recently?
Do you work in a job with any exposure risk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I work in healthcare and about three months ago I had a needle-stick injury — I never officially reported it at the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A dull discomfort under the right ribs
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pain or discomfort in your tummy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache under my ribs on the right side, not severe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood and no black or tarry stools
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood, or seen black tarry stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't vomited any blood and my stools haven't gone black.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No confusion, drowsiness, hand tremor or new bruising/bleeding at present
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt confused, unusually drowsy, or noticed your hands trembling?
Any easy bruising or bleeding from your gums?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm thinking clearly, I'm not drowsy, my hands aren't shaky, and I haven't noticed any bruising or bleeding.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: When the clinician begins to discuss the likely cause or next steps
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is this something serious? Is my liver going to be permanently damaged? I'm really scared about what this means for me long term.
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Acknowledges the fear without dismissing it, explains honestly that blood tests are needed to work out the cause and how the liver is coping, and does not offer false reassurance or a premature benign label.

deflection_behaviours.description: Initially downplays the needle-stick exposure out of embarrassment at not having reported it
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: If asked generally about exposures without a direct, non-judgemental prompt
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: I don't think I've been exposed to anything... well, there was a needle-stick at work a while back but I didn't make a big deal of it.
